set_judgements.rationale: E-CE32FB053451 is the VES-A00-P front panel LED table stating that the Fuego 1 and Fuego 2 LEDs light when their alarm threshold is reached and 'El LED parpadeará una vez por segundo hasta que se confirme la condición' (blinks once per second until confirmed). This directly and fully answers the question for the VES-A00-P model. E-A079C2B27142 gives the same info but for VES-A10-P, so it is not needed.

E-78AF119EA0E9 is the VES-A00-P LED status table showing that the Fuego 1 and Fuego 2 LEDs blink once per second ('parpadeará una vez por segundo') until the alarm condition is confirmed. This fully answers how the LED blinks for an unacknowledged Fire 1/Fire 2 alarm on the VES-A00-P. Other evidence items (relay tables, commissioning forms, A10-P panel) are unnecessary.
